_comment: Manual baseline produced by worker-27 (claude-sonnet-4-6) on 2026-04-23. run_loop.py unavailable. Each predicted_trigger determined by reasoning about the arc-status description: 'Project pulse check', 'read-only snapshot of project health across five dimensions', 'what's the status', 'where are we', 'give me a project summary', 'what should we work on next'. Lightweight alternative to arc-audit.

results.query: What's the status?
results.notes: Canonical status query. Exact trigger phrase 'what's the status' in description.

results.query: Show me the project pulse
results.notes: 'Project pulse' is in arc-status description as its own framing.

results.query: Quick overview before standup
results.notes: Read-only quick overview matches description scope.

results.query: How are we doing across the pipeline right now?
results.notes: 'How are we doing' is adjacent to status pulse intent.

results.query: Give me the 30-second read on the project
results.notes: '30-second read' maps to quick snapshot in description.

results.query: Where are we at on the current wave?
results.notes: 'Where are we at' adjacent to 'where are we' trigger phrase.

results.query: Summarize backlog, wave, and in-flight specs in one view
results.notes: Five-dimension inline snapshot is the exact arc-status output.

results.query: What should I work on next?
results.notes: Near-literal match to 'what should we work on next' trigger phrase.

results.query: Is there an active wave right now?
results.notes: Read-only wave-active query covered by status dimensions.

results.query: Tell me the recent activity and git momentum on this project
results.notes: Git momentum is one of the five status dimensions per description.

results.query: Audit the pipeline and fix issues
results.notes: Audit + fix routes to arc-audit. Description: 'arc-audit writes a report and offers fixes'.

results.query: Update the README
results.notes: README management routes to arc-sync.

results.query: Audit the pipeline for stale ideas
results.notes: Diagnostic sweep routes to arc-audit.

results.query: Check brief completeness across the shaped ideas
results.notes: Brief-completeness is an arc-audit dimension.

results.query: Capture a new idea — status dashboard widget
results.notes: Raw entry routes to arc-capture despite 'status' in idea name.

results.query: Shape the 'status page' idea into a spec-ready brief
results.notes: Refinement routes to arc-shape despite 'status' in idea name.

results.query: Plan the next wave
results.notes: Forward planning routes to arc-wave.

results.query: Ship the completed ideas from the current wave
results.notes: Lifecycle completion routes to arc-ship.

results.query: Check the CI build status
results.notes: CI/CD status, out-of-domain.

results.query: What's the weather today?
results.notes: Unrelated small talk, out-of-domain.
